name: Hotelogix Cloud Hotel PMS API
what_it_does: Hotelogix cloud hotel property management system REST API for independent hotels, hotel groups, and resorts in emerging markets to manage reservations, front desk operations, housekeeping, and distribution through a cloud-based PMS with integrated channel management. Enables AI agents to manage reservation creation and modification for hotel booking automation, handle front desk check-in and check-out for hotel operations automation, access channel manager integration for OTA availability distribution automation, retrieve housekeeping workflow and room status for hotel housekeeping automation, manage rate and inventory configuration for hotel revenue management automation, handle group booking and package management for hotel group business automation, access point-of-sale integration for hotel ancillary revenue automation, retrieve reporting and analytics for hotel performance automation, manage multi-property configuration for hotel group management, and integrate Hotelogix with GDS, OTAs, and hotel technology partners for end-to-end independent hotel operations.
use_cases: Managing independent hotel reservations from property automation agents
Syncing OTA availability from channel distribution agents
Tracking room status from housekeeping operations agents
Reporting hotel performance from analytics automation agents
not_for: Large luxury and full-service hotel chains needing casino or complex concierge integration (use Oracle OPERA)
Boutique European hotels needing strong GDPR tooling (use Mews or Apaleo)
best_when: An independent hotel, resort, or small hotel group in emerging markets (India, Southeast Asia, Middle East) wanting AI agents to automate reservation management, channel distribution, front desk operations, and hotel performance reporting within Hotelogix's cloud PMS.
avoid_when: EMERGING MARKET DATA RESIDENCY COMPLEXITY: Hotelogix is an India-founded company serving global markets; data residency for hotels in different countries may involve cross-border data transfer; automated guest data processing for EU or US hotels via Hotelogix must verify data residency configuration for GDPR or US state privacy law compliance. PCI-DSS PAYMENT CARD DATA FOR CREDIT CARD GUARANTEE: Automated reservation processing via Hotelogix involving credit card guarantees requires PCI-DSS compliant card data handling; verify Hotelogix payment integration certification level before automated payment processing deployment. MULTI-CURRENCY CONSOLIDATED REPORTING FOR HOTEL GROUPS: Hotelogix multi-property reporting for hotel groups with properties in different countries requires currency normalization; automated consolidated financial reporting without currency conversion creates non-comparable financial metrics across multi-country hotel portfolio.

auth.notes: Hotelogix uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. Chandigarh, India HQ with offices in US, UK, Australia. Founded 2008 by Prabhash Bhatnagar and Aditya Sanghi. Private. Cloud PMS focused on independent hotels in emerging markets (India, APAC, Middle East). Integrated channel manager connecting to 100+ OTAs. Multi-property support. GDPR. PCI-DSS. Competes with Cloudbeds, Little Hotelier, and eZee Absolute for independent hotel PMS in emerging markets.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-room monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-room monthly subscription; multi-property discounts; channel manager included in standard plan; API access for enterprise customers
pricing.notes: Chandigarh India. Private. Per-room monthly subscription. Channel manager included. Emerging market pricing. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; reservation and room queries throttled; webhooks for booking and availability events

known_agent_gotchas: CHANNEL MANAGER OTA SYNC LATENCY FOR BOOKING CONFIRMATION: Hotelogix channel manager syncs availability to OTAs in near-real-time but booking confirmation from OTAs may have variable lag; automated booking confirmation workflow should implement webhook listener for OTA booking events rather than polling; manual room assignment confirmation should be gated on booking confirmed status, not booking received status

NO IDEMPOTENCY FOR RESERVATION CREATION: Hotelogix reservation creation API does not support idempotency keys; automated booking agent retries on network failure risk creating duplicate reservations; implement external reservation tracking by confirmation number before API call retry to prevent duplicate bookings

API KEY FULL ACCOUNT ACCESS WITHOUT SCOPE CONTROL: Hotelogix API key provides broad account access without fine-grained scope control; automated integrations with full account access can read all guest data and rate configurations; implement application-level access control for different integration use cases to limit credential exposure

EMERGING MARKET NETWORK RELIABILITY CONSIDERATIONS: Hotels in emerging markets (India, APAC) may experience higher API latency and intermittent connectivity; automated workflows must implement robust retry logic and offline operation queueing for hotel operations in markets with less reliable internet connectivity

REPORTING DATA LAG FOR END-OF-DAY NIGHT AUDIT: Hotelogix daily reporting data is updated after night audit completion; automated daily performance reporting workflows must account for night audit timing variation by property time zone; automated reporting that queries before night audit completion returns incomplete daily metrics
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cloud hotel PMS. PCI-DSS, GDPR. API key/OAuth. IN/US/EU. Guest reservation, payment token, and hotel operations data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hotel PMS. PCI-DSS, GDPR. API key. IN/US/EU. Guest, reservation, and payment data.
